ai_summary: Nestlé India Limited has declared a Special Dividend of Rs. 2 per equity share, amounting to approximately Rs. 3.86 billion, which will be paid from 30th July 2026 alongside the final dividend for FY2025-26. This special distribution is notably sourced from a Rs. 7.41 billion reclassified amount that originated from the General Reserve in 2023, indicating a strategic use of previously accumulated capital within retained earnings. There are no immediate red flags concerning financial health or liquidity based on this declaration.
